description: Lead lives overseas or far from the property. STR is attractive because full management handles everything. Cannot manage themselves due to distance. High motivation to hand over fully.
key_drivers: full management model is a necessity not a preference
key_objections: concerned about trust — hard to verify from abroad
concerned about tax implications of overseas owner
what_resonates: full management model — nothing required from owner
UK-based bank account for payouts is straightforward
no need to be present for anything
pitch_angle: You are abroad — you need someone you can trust completely. Stayful does everything: guests, maintenance, cleaning, pricing, payouts. You receive money on the 1st-5th every month and see a statement. That is your entire involvement.
tax_note: Non-UK resident owners may have UK tax obligations on STR income. Not Stayful's advice to give, but flag early and recommend accountant review.

notable_leads.name: Rebecca H
notable_leads.note: Analytical evaluator. Remote or abroad. Needs detailed income breakdown.
